nodes.label: Navigator CLI - `Navigator install` sets up the Claude Code skill.
Warn if the installed skill is from an older Navigator version.
After a successful install, update .Navigator_version in all other known skill d
Copy skill file to ~/.gemini/skills/Navigator/, write GEMINI.md section, and ins
Remove the Navigator section from GEMINI.md, uninstall hook, and remove skill fi
Install Navigator skill for VS Code Copilot Chat + write .github/copilot-instruc
Remove Navigator VS Code Copilot Chat skill and .github/copilot-instructions.md
Write Navigator skill + steering file for Kiro IDE/CLI.
Remove Navigator skill + steering file for Kiro.
Install Navigator for Google Antigravity: skill + .agents/rules + .agents/workfl
Remove Navigator Antigravity rules, workflow, and skill files.
Write Navigator.js plugin and register it in opencode.json.
Remove Navigator.js plugin and deregister from opencode.json.
Write the Navigator section to the local AGENTS.md (Codex/OpenCode/OpenClaw).
Remove the Navigator section from the local AGENTS.md.
Write the Navigator section to the local CLAUDE.md.
